unity_generation: PASS_RSR11_GENERATE_PASS prefabs=28 materials=14 meshes=17 textures=56 previews=29
no_gameplay_components_justification: No exceptions. Visual-only prefabs remain GameObject, Transform, MeshFilter, MeshRenderer only.

blunt_target_comparison.surface_relief_depth: Actual MeshRenderer bricks/slabs/edges, shallow enough for overlay use; still modular rather than bespoke sculpted damage.
blunt_target_comparison.wetness_reflection: Wet smoothness maps plus warm/cool transparent helper cards; no real probes or lights in package.
blunt_target_comparison.mortar_darkness: Deep black mortar backers and coal crevice cards intentionally preserve dark joints.
blunt_target_comparison.brick_randomness: Alternating offsets, jittered sizes/depths, chips, and procedural maps reduce regularity; long corridors still need variant mixing.
blunt_target_comparison.ceiling_floor_scale: Ceiling bricks are tight/small; floor stones are larger slabs with raised lips and wider joints.
blunt_target_comparison.remaining_gaps: No scene lighting, collision, runtime decals, reflection probes, GI, or playable corridor placement included.

rollback_path: Remove local package reference com.brassworks.sidecar.room-surface-relief-set11 and delete the isolated Set11 roots.
